ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Continued To Jun-10-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances; Thomas Wrobel appearing via zoom for and with Christine Cordaro (petitioner) appearing via zoom.

The Court confirmed that Mrs. Schreiber lives in Roseville and not Rocklin. Mrs. Cordaro explained circumstances as to why she did not get a witness to the will rather than signing it herself. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated October 6, 2022 is admitted to probate. Christine B. Cordaro is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for May 28, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is not filed by May 14, 2024, an appearance will be required on May 28, 2024. Isadoor Bornstein is appointed Probate Referree.
Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.
